title: The Fighting American
writer: William Elwell Oliver, Raymond L. Schrock, Harvey Gates
actors: Pat O'Malley, Mary Astor, Raymond Hatton
plot: Bill Pendleton, a happy-go-lucky college student adept at both flying and football, accepts a wager from his fraternity pals that he will propose to any girl in the college they choose. Mary O'Mallory is chosen and, unaware of the...
